featureHighlights.title: Feature Highlights
featureHighlights.subtitle: Simplify your life with Tiler, Here's what we can do to help you.

tileCardSection.subHeader: Visualize your schedule with our intuitive tiles. Easily see your appointments, deadlines, and tasks at a glance.

conversation.subtitle: JUST TALK TO IT
conversation.title: Natural-Language Scheduling
conversation.description: Tell Tiler what you need to do in plain English. The AI asks follow-up questions, proposes smart schedules, and waits for your confirmation—no drag-and-drop required.

transit.subtitle: OPTIMIZE YOUR DAY
transit.title: Smart Travel Time
transit.description: Tiler automatically inserts realistic travel durations between locations and adjusts your timeline when things change—so you're never late.

adaptive.subtitle: STAYS IN SYNC
adaptive.title: Adaptive Intelligence
adaptive.description: When life throws a curveball, Tiler reschedules conflicting tasks and finds the next best time—automatically.

location.subtitle: PRIVACY-FIRST
location.title: Location Awareness
location.description: Use generic labels like 'home' or 'work' instead of specific addresses. Tiler calculates travel time without oversharing your personal data.

whatIsTiler.question: What is Tiler, and how does it work?
whatIsTiler.answer: Tiler is not a calendar, it is an AI-powered scheduling app that not only manages your tasks but also optimizes your time. It creates smart, flexible schedules using AutoTiles that adjust as your day shifts, while also letting you lock in non-negotiable tasks using Blocks.

differentFromCalendar.question: How is Tiler different from Google Calendar or other calendar apps?
differentFromCalendar.answer: Unlike static calendars, Tiler is your AI scheduling assistant. Just tell it what you need to do in plain English—it asks clarifying questions, calculates travel time between locations, and proposes a complete schedule. When life changes, Tiler adapts your timeline automatically. You confirm changes before they're made, so you stay in control.

aiAccuracy.question: Can I trust the AI to schedule my tasks correctly?
aiAccuracy.answer: Tiler uses a confirmation-first approach—it proposes schedules and waits for your approval before making changes. The AI learns your patterns over time and gets smarter about durations, locations, and preferences. You can always undo or adjust any suggestion.

locationPrivacy.question: Is my location data private? How does Tiler use it?
locationPrivacy.answer: Tiler respects your privacy. You can use generic labels like 'home,' 'work,' or 'local cafe' instead of specific addresses. Location data is only used to calculate realistic travel times between tasks, ensuring your schedule accounts for real-world constraints. Your data is never shared or sold.

calendarIntegration.question: Why do I need to integrate my calendar?
calendarIntegration.answer: Integrating your calendar with Tiler lets you see all your tasks, events, and schedules in one place. No more juggling multiple apps or risking double bookings—Tiler automatically syncs everything and optimizes your day for maximum productivity.

multipleCalendars.question: Can I integrate multiple calendars to my Tiler account?
multipleCalendars.answer: Yes! You can integrate multiple calendars into your Tiler account. This way, all your events and tasks are in one place.

tileVsBlock.question: What's the difference between a Tile and a Block?
tileVsBlock.answer: Tiles are flexible tasks that Tiler automatically schedules and adjusts based on your availability. Blocks are fixed tasks that stay exactly where you set them—perfect for meetings or tasks that can't be moved.

tileShare.question: How does TileShare work?
tileShare.answer: TileShare lets you share tasks with others—friends, family, teammates—so everyone knows what needs to be done and who's handling it. Assign tasks, track progress, and sync schedules effortlessly.

missedTask.question: What if I miss a task or need to reschedule?
missedTask.answer: No worries! Tiler's Defer feature automatically finds the next best time to complete a missed task. You can also manually reschedule with a simple drag-and-drop.

habitTracking.question: Can Tiler help with habit tracking?
habitTracking.answer: Yes! You can use Tiler to schedule and track daily habits. Tiler auto-fits them into your schedule, so you stay consistent.

transitFeature.question: How can I use the Transit feature?
transitFeature.answer: The transit feature goes beyond just calculating travel time — it acts as your navigation assistant. It helps you plan routes, suggests the best modes of transportation, and provides real-time directions for seamless transitions between tasks and locations. Just tap the travel icon to get instant navigation, ensuring you're always on time and on track.

seo.title: Discover - Tiler
seo.description: Explore the moments where your day finally makes sense. Find your way around the Tiler app and discover things to try in-app.

hero.title: Here’s Where Everything Lives
hero.subtitle: Explore the moments where your day finally makes sense. Find your way around the app. Find things to try in-app.

howToUseTiler.title: From intent to done. In seconds.
howToUseTiler.summary: Connect your calendar, add your tiles, and let Tiler build the rest. A step-by-step guide to running your day with Tiler.

connectCalendar.title: Connect a Calendar
connectCalendar.body: Connecting your calendar allows Tiler to see your real commitments. Once synced, incoming calendar events appear as blocks in your timeline. You can accept, edit, or resolve conflicts directly inside Tiler. When events change, Tiler adapts your tiles around them so your day stays balanced and realistic.

createBlock.title: How to Create a Block
createBlock.body: Blocks represent fixed commitments, meetings, appointments, events, and things that must happen at a specific time. When you create or sync a block, Tiler treats it as non-negotiable and schedules your flexible work around it. Blocks don’t move unless you move them. This is how Tiler respects real-world commitments while still keeping your day workable.

flexibleTiles.title: Creating Flexible Tiles
flexibleTiles.body: Tiles are where Tiler becomes powerful. A tile represents something you need to do, without locking it to a rigid time. You set the intent, estimated duration, and optional deadline — Tiler handles placement. Tiles can move, adapt, and reshuffle as your day changes, making them ideal for real work, errands, habits, and focus sessions.

updateTile.title: How to Update a Tile
updateTile.body: Updating a tile is how you communicate change to the system. You can adjust its duration, defer it, change its deadline, or mark it complete. The moment you do, Tiler re-optimises your timeline to reflect the update. You don’t need to move other tasks manually, the system handles the ripple effects.

travelTime.title: Travel Time & Route
travelTime.body: Add a location to any tile and Tiler handles the rest. It auto-detects where you need to be and calculates real travel time between every stop on your day. That orange block sitting between your tiles isn’t a gap — it’s your journey, already planned. Tap it and your route opens: turn-by-turn directions loaded, time accounted for. Your schedule doesn’t just tell you what to do. It gets you there.

features.title: Everything Tiler can do.
features.summary: Every feature is built around one principle: your schedule should work for you, not the other way around.

adaptiveTiles.name: Adaptive Tiles
adaptiveTiles.desc: The core unit of Tiler. Each tile is a task, event, or habit with a duration — Tiler schedules them intelligently and moves them when your day changes.

aiScheduling.name: AI scheduling assistant
aiScheduling.desc: Tiler asks clarifying questions, proposes the best available time, and builds a complete schedule including dependencies — always with your approval first.

chatScheduling.name: Chat scheduling
chatScheduling.desc: Tell Tiler what you need through a natural chat interface. It understands your intent and proposes a plan without you filling in a single form.

naturalLanguage.name: Natural language input
naturalLanguage.desc: Describe tasks in plain English — no forms, no dropdowns. Tiler understands context, urgency, duration, and location from how you naturally talk.

autoTravel.name: Auto travel buffers
autoTravel.desc: Tiler automatically inserts realistic travel time between location-based tiles based on your actual distance and transit options. Back-to-back never means late.

autoLocations.name: Auto locations
autoLocations.desc: Link locations to tiles once and Tiler remembers. Every time that task appears, travel time is calculated automatically from wherever you are.

timeRestrictions.name: Time restrictions
timeRestrictions.desc: Set the hours you’re available and Tiler only schedules within those bounds. Your personal time stays yours — no task bleeds into off-hours unless you allow it.

adaptiveRescheduling.name: Adaptive rescheduling
adaptiveRescheduling.desc: When a meeting runs long or a task gets missed, Tiler detects the ripple across your whole day and proposes fixes — instantly, with your approval before changing anything.

calendarIntegration.name: Calendar integration
calendarIntegration.desc: Connect Google Calendar or Outlook. Tiler reads your existing events and schedules all new tiles around them — no double bookings, ever. Supports multiple calendars.

crossPlatform.name: Cross-platform sync
crossPlatform.desc: Web, iOS, and Android all stay in real-time sync. Start a task on your laptop and check in on your phone without missing a beat. One schedule, everywhere.

habitScheduling.name: Habit scheduling
habitScheduling.desc: Add recurring habits and Tiler auto-fits them around your day — keeping you consistent with your routines without you having to think about it each morning.

deferReschedule.name: Defer & reschedule
deferReschedule.desc: Missed a tile? Tiler’s Defer feature instantly finds the next best slot and reschedules with one tap. Never lose a task — just push it forward intelligently.

smartNotifications.name: Smart notifications
smartNotifications.desc: Get alerted when it’s time to leave for your next tile — with live transit updates if your route changes. Never miss a departure time because you lost track of the clock.

tileShare.name: TileShare
tileShare.desc: Share tiles with family or teammates. Assign who handles what. Track completion. Everyone’s calendar adapts around shared commitments automatically — no extra apps needed.
